deadline_notes: CPE period: July 1 – June 30. Annual license renewal. Rolling 120hr/3yr also applies.
notes: 6hr ethics per 3-year period for CPAs who 'hold out' to the public — above the 4hr national norm. Late renewal: $185 fee (Jul 31–Aug 31). Hard August 31 expiry — license actually lapses after Aug 31 (not just a late fee). Rolling 120hr/3yr.
